message:
refactor(database): remove unused AsyncDbPool::try_get method

The try_get() method on AsyncDbPool was never called anywhere in the
codebase. Its synchronous checkout-with-validation logic was also
incomplete — the validate_on_checkout branch would push the connection
back onto the idle queue and return None regardless, making the method
non-functional for validated pools. Removing it simplifies the async
pool's public API surface.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
